key_insight: AI is transforming polymer research from isolated prediction tasks into autonomous discovery systems that link data, modeling, experimentation, and reasoning in closed feedback loops.
engineering_relevance: This enables faster, more reliable polymer design and process optimization for applications in energy storage, microelectronics, healthcare, and sustainable manufacturing.
method: Build polymer databases and data infrastructure for multimodal materials data.
Use machine learning, large AI models, and AI agents for prediction, planning, and decision support.
Connect models to laboratory automation for iterative hypothesis generation, experiment execution, and model refinement.
evidence_signal: The paper is a perspective/vision article drawing on the growing convergence of databases, predictive models, AI agents, and automated labs rather than reporting a single benchmark dataset or experimental evaluation.
watch_item: Autonomous polymer discovery will still depend on high-quality data, robust model validation, and careful integration across simulation, experiments, and scientific reasoning.
paper_title: Empowering Polymeric Materials Discovery by Artificial Intelligence
